name: Catamaran Lagoon 380 S
tagline: Spacious and stable catamaran perfect for larger groups and multi-day charters
summary: The Lagoon 380 S offers exceptional stability and space, making it ideal for larger groups and overnight charters with its 4 cabins.
description: The Catamaran Lagoon 380 S provides an unmatched sailing experience with its twin-hull design offering superior stability and expansive deck space. With 4 cabins available, this catamaran is perfect for overnight charters and larger groups seeking comfort on the water.
facilities: 2x Toilet with shower, 4 Cabins, Sound System, Kitchen, WiFi, Air Conditioning, Snorkeling Equipment, Fishing Tools
safety: Sea Safe Tracking, Satellite Phone, Life Raft, Life Jackets, Life Rings, Insurance covered by Jasa Raharja Putra
included: Towels, Snorkeling accessories, Fishing equipment, Water, tea, coffee and non-alcoholic drinks
optionalExtras: Transfer, Diving accessories, Surfing accessories, Restaurant lunch at island, Professional photographer, DJ with equipment, Alcoholic drinks, Fresh fruits & snacks
pricingNotes: Nusa Dua 4hrs: Rp 25,000,000 | Nusa Penida/Lembongan 8hrs: Rp 32,000,000 | Lombok/Gili: Rp 64,000,000 (min 4 nights)
paymentPolicy: 50% deposit required. Full payment before trip. IDR currencies only.
cancellationPolicy: Low season: 50% within 7 days | High season: 50% within 30 days | Within 7 days: 100% | Weather: 25%
